items.label: Blunt
items.name: Baseball Bat
items.desc: Plausible deniability. Everyone in Leonida has one.

items.label: Blade
items.name: Combat Knife
items.desc: Military-spec blade for close quarters.

items.label: Blunt
items.name: Crowbar
items.desc: Opens doors and skulls.

items.label: Blunt
items.name: Golf Club
items.desc: Vice City staple. Technically a sports item.

items.label: Blade
items.name: Knife
items.desc: Silent. Permanent.

items.label: Blunt
items.name: Pool Cue
items.desc: Bar fight standard. Snaps on the third swing.

items.label: Thrown
items.name: Throwing Knife
items.desc: Silent ranged option. Skill-dependent.

items.label: Sidearm
items.name: Machine Pistol
items.desc: Full-auto in your pocket. Close range. Very loud.

items.label: Sidearm
items.name: Heavy Revolver
items.desc: Six rounds. Each one is a statement.

items.label: Sidearm
items.name: Standard Pistol
items.desc: The default. 9mm, semi-auto. Carried by everyone on both sides.

items.label: SMG
items.name: Compact SMG
items.desc: More range and accuracy than the Micro. Still fits in a jacket.

items.label: SMG
items.name: Micro SMG
items.desc: Compact and concealable. Drive-by capable.

items.label: Sniper
items.name: Sniper Rifle
items.desc: One round, one result. Grassrivers and rooftops.

items.label: Rifle
items.name: Carbine Rifle
items.desc: Reliable at most engagement distances in Leonida.

items.label: Rifle
items.name: Heavy Rifle
items.desc: Punches through cover that other rifles respect.

items.label: LMG
items.name: Light Machine Gun
items.desc: Volume of fire over precision. Suppression tool.

items.label: Rifle
items.name: Standard Assault Rifle
items.desc: Full-size platform. More accurate at distance.

items.label: Shotgun
items.name: Pump Action Shotgun
items.desc: Decisive at close range.

items.label: Explosive
items.name: Frag Grenade
items.desc: Standard fragmentation. Clears rooms and vehicles.

items.label: Incendiary
items.name: Molotov
items.desc: Fire spreads. Cheap, available, impossible to ignore.

items.label: Item
items.name: Petrol Can
items.desc: Trail it, light it.

items.label: Heavy
items.name: Rocket Launcher
items.desc: For when the situation requires a different category of response.

items.label: Explosive
items.name: Sticky Bomb
items.desc: Place it, leave, detonate when ready.

items.label: Tactical
items.name: Flashbang
items.desc: Disorientation without fatality.

items.label: Tactical
items.name: Smoke Grenade
items.desc: Cover for movement or extraction.

items.label: Special
items.name: Spear Gun
items.desc: Underwater and coastal operations.
